message:
test(widgets): add E2E standalone decision card embedding tests (bd-1lg.14)

10 integration tests proving the galaxy-brain decision card works in
isolation without the full runtime loop:
- All 4 disclosure levels render correct content
- All 7 decision domains render
- All 3 traffic light signals produce distinct output
- External evidence injection works
- Degenerate area handling (zero-size, too narrow/short)
- min_height is accurate for all levels
- Composition with Block widget

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
